Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, From Defendant Leland Jung, To Overrule All Objections, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEXANDER M. WEYAND, Esq. of Weyand Law Firm (Tel: 415-536-2800) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS LESTER JUNG and ROLAND JUNG's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, From Defendant Leland Jung, To Overrule All Objections, And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiffs stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for plaintiffs appearing remotely authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. The objections to the Form Interrogatories are not well taken and are overruled entirely. The requests for production are all reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. All objections other than privilege and work product are overruled. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $847.50. Complete responses, production of documents, and payment of sanctions must be served no later than August 27, 2021, or such other date as the parties may agree.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
